winner.headline: Join Thousands Who’ve Built Their First Web Portfolio
winner.body: Students, freelancers, and career switchers trust SkillForge Studio’s concise lessons, AI tool insights, and guided feedback to create showcase‑ready websites. Start today and see your portfolio come to life.

reason: Variant 3 follows the brand rules best: it clearly states the benefit, uses warm and practical language, avoids hype, includes a low‑pressure CTA, and follows a logical hook → value → invitation flow while remaining honest and audience‑aware.
